title: TapTree
description: A TapTree is the Merkle tree of tapscript leaves committed inside a Taproot output. It lets one output commit to multiple script paths while only revealing the executed leaf and a proof path when spent.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Defines Taproot script tree commitments and script-path witness structure.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Workshop module 2.4 demonstrates constructing a TapTree and spending via one revealed script.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Taproot
resources.notes: Higher-level context for why Taproot script trees improve privacy and flexibility.
